name: AI Job Search and Auto-Apply Assistant

interface.label: The We Work Remotely URL for Extracting Jobs (C)

mapper.input:
Analyze the job posting from this URL:
{{11.`10`}}

Task
Extract only the exact information available in the job post.

Instructions

* Read the full page carefully
* Group all sections like responsibilities, roles, job description under Role Summary
* Group all sections like requirements, skills, qualifications under Qualification
* Extract only if the section is explicitly present
* If a section is missing, do not create or assume it
* Do not add external or inferred information
* Keep the output concise and clear

Output

Role Summary

* point 1
* point 2
* point 3

Qualification

* point 1
* point 2
* point 3

Output rules

Role Summary

* Each point must be single line
* Limit to 3 to 5 points which has very relevant information
* Use short and simple statements

Qualification

* Each point must be single line
* Limit to 3 to 5 points which has very relevant information
* Convert the sentence into short and skill focused statements
* Rewrite in the simple words without changing meaning
* Keep bullets short and direct

General rules

* Do not use markdown or special symbols
* Use plain text only
* Do not assume missing information
* Do not repeat information
* Keep output short and structured
* DO NOT CONTAIN:
“lorem”
“example”
“sample”
“not provided”
URL

Goal
Ensure the output strictly reflects the actual content of the job page with no assumptions or added data

messages.content:
You are a strict job relevance evaluator.

Candidate Profile:

Skills
{{76.Skills}}

Tools Used
{{76.Tools_Used}}

Experience
{{76.Experience}}

Job Content:
{{15.result}}

Task
Evaluate how well this job matches the candidate.

Return only: 
{
"match_score": X,
"decision": "Yes" or "No"
}

Rules

* X from 0 to 10
* Yes - if X >= 6, otherwise, No
* No explanation/suggestion/extra test

mapper.prompt:
Create a modern and professional job hiring poster.

Design

* Background: light grey
* Bold headline at top left with font size 16 in Blue color
* Blue and yellow color theme
* Add cursor icon near headline in yellow color
* Left side: text content
* Bottom right: curved blue shape with company name {{11.`5`}}
* Bottom left add one sentences  
URL- in font 8 in blue color
* Clean spacing and minimal layout

Text to embed

Headline
NEW OPENING for role {{11.`6`}}

Section 1
* {{15.result}}

Section 2
URL: {{11.`10`}}

Instructions

* Align all text left
* Ensure proper spacing between sections
* Do not include email id
* Use plain text only
* Ensure text fits within layout without overflow

Goal
Generate a clean hiring poster with structured bullet points and clear call to action

model.label: gpt-image-1-mini (system)A cost-efficient version of GPT Image 1

mapper.textPrompt:
You are a professional cover letter writer.

Task
Write a personalized cover letter in a structured workflow format.

Input
<Job Summary> {{15.result}}

<Candidate Profile>
 {{76.Skills}}{{76.Tools_Used}}{{76.Experience}}

Instructions

* Use a human and natural tone
* Keep it concise and impactful
* Do not use generic phrases
* Do not copy the job description
* Do not invent experience
* Keep each section short and clear
* Each point must be single line
* Focus only on relevant skills and experience
* role_fit - Align top 2 or 3 skills with job, based on the <Job Summary> and <Candidate profile> 
* experience - List 1 or 2 relevant achievement or past work, based on the <Job Summary> and <Candidate profile> 
* value - Briefly write what impact the candidate can bring to this role, based on the <Job Summary> and <Candidate profile> 

Output format (JSON only)

{
"role_fit": [
"point 1",
"point 2",
"point 3"
],
"experience": [
"point 1",
"point 2"
],
"value": [
"point 1",
"point 2"
],
"action": [
"Resume attached",
"Available for discussion"
]
}

Goal
Make it sharp, relevant, and easy to scan while clearly showing fit for the role.

model.label: GPT OSS 120BPowerful, open-source model built for complex logic puzzles and high-level reasoning tasks

messages.content:
You are a strict evaluator.

Input
Job Content:
{{15.result}}

Candidate Resume:
Skills
{{76.Skills}}

Tools Used
{{76.Tools_Used}}

Experience
{{76.Experience}}

Task
Identify what is missing in the candidate profile compared to the job.

Rules

Extract only missing skills, tools, or experience
Do not repeat skills already present
Keep each item short and single line
Maximum 5 points
No explanation

Output format

- skill 1
- skill 2
 - skill 3
